name: H2O Neural Network
description: H2O Deep Learning is based on a multi-layer feedforward artificial neural network that is trained with stochastic gradient descent using back-propagation.
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input

fields.name: isResponseIsCategorical
fields.title: isResponseColIsCategorical
fields.description: Set to 'true' for Classification (categorical target) or 'false' for Regression (numeric target).

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Fraction of data used for training (e.g., 0.8 for 80%).

fields.name: labelCol
fields.title: Label Column
fields.description: The target column to be predicted.

fields.name: ignoredCols
fields.title: Ignored Columns
fields.description: Columns to exclude from the model building process.

fields.name: columnsToCategorical
fields.title: Columns to Categorical
fields.description: Numeric or String columns that should be treated as categorical factors/enums.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Seed for reproducibility. Use -1 for a random seed.

fields.name: balanceClasses
fields.title: Balance Classes
fields.description: Oversample minority classes to balance class distribution (recommended for imbalanced data).

fields.name: maxAfterBalanceSize
fields.title: Max After Balance Size
fields.description: Maximum relative size of training data after balancing. Requires balanceClasses.

fields.name: activation
fields.title: Activation
fields.description: Activation function for neurons. Rectifier is the standard default.

fields.name: hidden
fields.title: Hidden
fields.description: Hidden layer sizes. Format: 100, 100 (two layers of 100 neurons).

fields.name: epochs
fields.title: Epochs
fields.description: Number of iterations over the full dataset. Fractional values are allowed.

fields.name: nfolds
fields.title: Number of Folds
fields.description: Folds for cross-validation. Set to 0 to disable, or >= 2 to enable.

fields.name: trainSamplesPerIteration
fields.title: Train Samples Per Iteration
fields.description: Samples per MapReduce iteration. -1: all data, -2: automatic.

fields.name: targetRatioCommToComp
fields.title: Target ratio comm to comp
fields.description: Communication overhead target (only for multi-node clusters).

fields.name: categoricalEncoding
fields.title: Categorical Encoding
fields.description: Method to handle categorical features. 'AUTO' or 'OneHotInternal' are common defaults.

fields.name: ignoreConstCols
fields.title: Ignore Const Columns
fields.description: Whether to discard columns with only one unique value.

fields.name: scoreEachIteration
fields.title: Score Each Iteration
fields.description: Enable to score the model after every training iteration.

fields.name: stoppingRounds
fields.title: Stopping Rounds
fields.description: Stop training if performance doesn't improve for N rounds. 0 to disable.

fields.name: maxRuntimeSecs
fields.title: Max Runtime Secs
fields.description: Maximum time allowed for model training in seconds. 0 means no limit.

fields.name: stoppingMetric
fields.title: StoppingMetric
fields.description: Metric to monitor for early stopping (e.g., logloss for classification).

fields.name: stoppingTolerance
fields.title: StoppingTolerance
fields.description: Relative tolerance for metric improvement.

fields.name: standardize
fields.title: Standardize
fields.description: Scale numeric columns to zero mean and unit variance. Highly recommended for Neural Networks.

fields.name: loss
fields.title: Loss
fields.description: Loss function to minimize during training.

fields.name: adaptiveRate
fields.title: Adaptive Rate
fields.description: Enable ADADELTA adaptive learning rate (rho and epsilon).

fields.name: rho
fields.title: Rho
fields.description: Adaptive rate time decay factor. Higher values are more similar to momentum.

fields.name: epsilon
fields.title: Epsilon
fields.description: Adaptive rate smoothing factor to avoid division by zero.

fields.name: rate
fields.title: Rate
fields.description: Static learning rate (only if adaptive rate is disabled).

fields.name: rateAnnealing
fields.title: Rate Annealing
fields.description: Learning rate annealing factor.

fields.name: rateDecay
fields.title: Rate Decay
fields.description: Learning rate decay factor between layers.

fields.name: momentumStart
fields.title: Momentum Start
fields.description: Initial momentum at the start of training.

fields.name: momentumRamp
fields.title: Momentum Ramp
fields.description: Number of samples for which momentum increases.

fields.name: momentumStable
fields.title: Momentum Stable
fields.description: Final stable momentum after the ramp.

fields.name: nesterovAcceleratedGradient
fields.title: Nesterov Accelerated Gradient
fields.description: Use Nesterov momentum (recommended for faster convergence).

fields.name: inputDropoutRatio
fields.title: Input Dropout Ratio
fields.description: Fraction of input features to drop (e.g., 0.1) to improve generalization.

fields.name: hiddenDropoutRatios
fields.title: Hidden Dropout Ratios
fields.description: Fraction of neurons to drop per hidden layer. Format: 0.5, 0.5.

fields.name: l1
fields.title: L1
fields.description: L1 regularization (lasso) to encourage sparsity in weights.

fields.name: l2
fields.title: L2
fields.description: L2 regularization (ridge) to prevent large weight magnitudes.

fields.name: maxW2
fields.title: Max W2
fields.description: Constraint for squared sum of incoming weights per unit.

fields.name: initialWeightDistribution
fields.title: Initial Weight Distribution
fields.description: Method to initialize weight matrices.

fields.name: initialWeightScale
fields.title: Initial Weight Scale
fields.description: Scaling factor for initialization (Uniform: range, Normal: stddev).

fields.name: scoreInterval
fields.title: Score interval
fields.description: Minimum seconds between model scoring events.

fields.name: scoreTrainingSamples
fields.title: Score Training Samples
fields.description: Number of training samples used for scoring.

fields.name: scoreValidationSamples
fields.title: Score Validation Samples
fields.description: Number of validation samples used for scoring.

fields.name: scoreDutyCycle
fields.title: Score Duty Cycle
fields.description: Max fraction of time spent on scoring vs training.

fields.name: classificationStop
fields.title: Classification Stop
fields.description: Stop if training error fraction falls below this value.

fields.name: regressionStop
fields.title: Regression Stop
fields.description: Stop if training MSE falls below this value.

fields.name: quietMode
fields.title: Quiet mode
fields.description: Reduce log output during training.

fields.name: scoreValidationSampling
fields.title: Score Validation Sampling
fields.description: Sampling method for validation scoring.

fields.name: overwriteWithBestModel
fields.title: Overwrite With Best Model
fields.description: Replace final model with the best version found during training.

fields.name: useAllFactorLevels
fields.title: Use All Factor Levels
fields.description: Include all categorical levels in expansion (useful for variable importance).

fields.name: diagnostics
fields.title: Diagnostics
fields.description: Calculate diagnostic information for layers.

fields.name: calculateFeatureImportances
fields.title: Calculate Feature Importances
fields.description: Compute variable importance (Gedeon method). May be slow.

fields.name: fastMode
fields.title: Fast Mode
fields.description: Use minor approximations in back-propagation for speed.

fields.name: forceLoadBalance
fields.title: Force Load Balance
fields.description: Redistribute data to keep all cluster cores active.

fields.name: replicateTrainingData
fields.title: Replicate Training Data
fields.description: Copy data to all nodes (recommended for small datasets).

fields.name: singleNodeMode
fields.title: Single Node Mode
fields.description: Run on a single node (useful for fine-tuning).

fields.name: shuffleTrainingData
fields.title: Shuffle Training Data
fields.description: Shuffle data before each epoch (recommended).

fields.name: missingValuesHandling
fields.title: Missing Values Handling
fields.description: Strategy for null values (impute mean or skip row).

fields.name: sparse
fields.title: Sparse
fields.description: Efficient handling of sparse data (many zeros).

fields.name: averageActivation
fields.title: Average Activation
fields.description: Target activation for auto-encoders.

fields.name: sparsityBeta
fields.title: Sparsity Beta
fields.description: Sparsity regularization weight.

fields.name: maxCategoricalFeatures
fields.title: Max Categorical Features
fields.description: Max features after categorical expansion.

fields.name: reproducible
fields.title: Reproducible
fields.description: Forces single-threaded execution for identical results (slow).

fields.name: exportWeightsAndBiases
fields.title: Export Weights And Biases
fields.description: Export network weights to H2O frames.

fields.name: miniBatchSize
fields.title: Mini Batch Size
fields.description: Number of samples per weight update.

fields.name: elasticAveraging
fields.title: Elastic Averaging
fields.description: Synchronize weights across nodes periodically.

fields.name: elasticAveragingMovingRate
fields.title: Elastic Averaging Moving Rate
fields.description: Moving rate for weight synchronization.

fields.name: elasticAveragingRegularization
fields.title: Elastic Averaging Regularization
fields.description: Strength of elastic averaging synchronization.

fields.name: keepCrossValidationModels
fields.title: Keep Cross Validation Models
fields.description: Keep models of individual folds in memory.

fields.name: keepCrossValidationPredictions
fields.title: Keep Cross Validation Predictions
fields.description: Required to be true for building Stacked Ensembles later.

fields.name: keepCrossValidationFoldAssignment
fields.title: Keep Cross Validation Fold Assignment
fields.description: Keep fold index assignments for rows.

fields.name: distribution
fields.title: Distribution
fields.description: Distribution family of the response variable.

fields.name: tweediePower
fields.title: Tweedie Power
fields.description: Power parameter for Tweedie regression.

fields.name: quantileAlpha
fields.title: Quantile Alhpa
fields.description: Target quantile for quantile regression.

fields.name: huberAlpha
fields.title: Huber Alpha
fields.description: Quantile threshold for Huber loss.

fields.name: weightCol
fields.title: Weight Column
fields.description: Column containing row weights.

fields.name: offsetCol
fields.title: Offset Column
fields.description: Column added to the combination of features.

fields.name: foldCol
fields.title: Fold Column
fields.description: Column containing cross-validation fold indices.

fields.name: foldAssignment
fields.title: Fold Assignment
fields.description: Method for CV fold assignment. 'Stratified' is recommended for imbalanced data.

fields.name: aucType
fields.title: AUC Type
fields.description: Calculation method for multinomial AUC.

fields.name: output_confusion_matrix_chart
fields.title: Output Confusion Matrix Chart
fields.description: Enable to visualize predicted vs actual classes.

fields.name: cm_chart_title
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Title
fields.description: Title name for the chart.

fields.name: cm_chart_description
fields.value: Visual Representation of Predicted vs. Actual Classes
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Description
fields.description: Description for the chart.

fields.name: confusionMatrixTargetLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Target Legend
fields.description: Label for actual target values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixPredictedLabelLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix PredictedLabel Legend
fields.description: Label for predicted class values.

fields.name: output_roc_curve
fields.title: Output ROC Curve
fields.description: Enable to display the ROC curve chart.

fields.name: roc_title
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Title
fields.description: Title for the ROC chart.

fields.name: roc_description
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Description
fields.description: Summary of the ROC chart.

fields.name: xlabel
fields.title: X Label
fields.description: X-axis label.

fields.name: ylabel
fields.title: Y Label
fields.description: Y-axis label.

fields.name: paramKeys
fields.title: Param Name
fields.description: Select the hyperparameters to tune.

fields.name: paramValues
fields.title: Param Value
fields.description: Enter comma-separated values for selected keys.

fields.name: gridStrategy
fields.title: Grid Search Strategy
fields.description: 'Cartesian' tests every combination. 'RandomDiscrete' stops after a specific limit.

fields.name: gridMaxModels
fields.title: Grid Max Models
fields.description: Limits total models in RandomDiscrete search.

fields.name: gridMaxRuntimeSecs
fields.title: Grid Max Runtime Seconds
fields.description: Limits search time in seconds. 0 means no limit.

fields.name: gridStoppingRounds
fields.title: Grid Stopping Rounds
fields.description: Stops grid search if performance doesn't improve.

fields.name: gridStoppingTolerance
fields.title: Grid Stopping Tolerance
fields.description: Minimum improvement required to continue.

fields.name: gridStoppingMetric
fields.title: Grid Stopping Metric
fields.description: Metric used for early stopping during search.

fields.name: gridParallelism
fields.title: Grid Parallelism
fields.description: Number of models to train in parallel.

fields.name: gridSelectBestModelBy
fields.title: Grid Select Best Model By
fields.description: Metric used to choose the best model.
